task_completion.description: The agent locates the 'Office Design Project - Gemini' opportunity in Odoo CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo CRM interface displaying the 'Office Design Project - Gemini' opportunity in either a list view or a detailed form view.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the customer for the 'Office Design Project - Gemini' opportunity to 'Gemini Furniture'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Customer' field for the 'Office Design Project - Gemini' opportunity is populated with 'Gemini Furniture'.

task_completion.description: The agent views the internal notes/chatter for 'Q3 Consultation Services' to identify the correct customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed form view of the 'Q3 Consultation Services' opportunity is open, and the chatter/log section at the bottom or side is visible, showing a note that states the client is 'Azure Interior'.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the customer for the 'Q3 Consultation Services' opportunity to 'Azure Interior'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Customer' field for the 'Q3 Consultation Services' opportunity is populated with 'Azure Interior'.

task_completion.description: The agent locates the 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict' opportunity in Odoo CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo CRM interface displaying the 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict' opportunity in either a list view or a detailed form view.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the customer for the 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict' opportunity to 'Deco Addict'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Customer' field for the 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict' opportunity is populated with 'Deco Addict'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo CRM graphical user interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard Odoo web interface being used, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent selected the customers from the Odoo database rather than typing answers into a disconnected document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The customer names appear inside the official Odoo 'Customer' input fields, typically showing a dropdown selection or a relational link icon.

integrity.description: The agent saved the modifications to the opportunities.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI shows the records in a saved state (e.g., clicking a 'Save' button, clicking out of the edit mode, or returning to the pipeline view where the new customer names are visible on the opportunity cards).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct customer mappings are: 1) 'Office Design Project - Gemini' must be linked to 'Gemini Furniture' (30 pts). 2) 'Q3 Consultation Services' must be linked to 'Azure Interior' (40 pts, this information is explicitly stated in the opportunity's internal notes/chatter). 3) 'Software License Renewal - Deco Addict' must be linked to 'Deco Addict' (30 pts). All partner records are pre-created in the Odoo database.
